# Flutter Deliverables Contract

## 1. Dart Dependencies
Define the packages, library versions, and execution environments required for this deliverable.
- Dart SDK constraints.
- Flutter version constraints.
- Third-party packages (e.g., HTTP clients, state management plugins).

## 2. State Management Model
Describe the data flow architecture, state containers, business logic components, and UI binding strategies.
- Architecture pattern details.
- Event tracking, states mapping, and side effects.
- Directives for state preservation and injection.

## 3. Responsive Widgets Checklist
Verify widgets adjust to different screen sizes, orientations, and pixel densities.
- [ ] Adaptive layout testing (mobile, tablet, desktop).
- [ ] Safe area and overflow handling.
- [ ] Standardized typography scaling.

## 4. Integration Tests
Outline the automated suite to verify widget interactions, database calls, and API responses.
- Setup parameters.
- Test scenarios and assertions.
- Platform-specific runner configuration.

## 5. Development Lifecycle
Maintain quality controls under development frameworks.
- Branching Model: Git Flow (features must develop on feature/* branches before merging to develop).
- Commit Strategy: Adhere strictly to Conventional Commits (e.g., feat(flutter): implement responsive widget constraints).
